auth.signInDesc: Sign in to track your nutrition
auth.signUpDesc: Create an account to get started
auth.confirmLink: We sent you a confirmation link.

dashboard.describeFood: Describe what you ate by voice

food.whatDidYouEat: What did you eat? (e.g. 'chicken breast with rice')
food.pointCamera: Point your camera at your meal
food.aiDetect: AI will detect food items and estimate nutrition
food.addFirstMeal: Use the buttons above to add your first meal

result.disclaimer: Estimates may vary. Adjust portions and values above if needed for accuracy.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

progress.title: Progress
progress.log2Weights: Log at least 2 weights to see your trend
progress.logFewDays: Log a few days of food to see trends
progress.noMacroData: No data yet for macro trends
progress.entryExistsDesc: A weight log for this date already exists. Edit it instead.

coach.title: Coach Tips
coach.lowProtein: You're low on protein today. Try adding chicken, eggs, or Greek yogurt.
coach.highSugar: High sugar intake detected ({{amount}}g). Watch out for hidden sugars.
coach.heavyMeal: Your {{meal}} is {{pct}}% of total calories. Try spreading meals more evenly.
coach.overTarget: You're {{amount}} kcal above target today — that's just data, not a setback. A slightly lighter meal tomorrow keeps the weekly average on track. Consistency beats perfection! 📊
coach.slightlyOver: Slightly over target by {{amount}} kcal — totally normal. One day doesn't define progress. 💪
coach.onTrack: You're right on track with your calorie goal! 🎯
coach.highFat: Fat intake is above target. Opt for leaner options for the rest of the day.
coach.drinkWater: Don't forget to drink water! You're behind on hydration. 💧

voice.notSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser.

nudge.photoLogging: Save time with AI photo logging.
nudge.weeklyInsights: Get deeper weekly insights with Premium.
